input.instructions: Identify the universal De Giorgi exponent formula for dissipative PDEs with diffusion order 's' in dimension 'n'. Then, verify this formula by calculating/applying it to the following specific cases: 3D Navier-Stokes, 2D Navier-Stokes, 1D Burgers, Surface Quasi-Geostrophic (SQG) equations, Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD), and fractional Navier-Stokes. Ensure the exponent is expressed in terms of n and s. Provide the final answer in the requested format.
